bodyTemplate:
Hi {inviteeName},

A co-leader of the footbag club "{clubName}" invited you to join its leadership as a co-leader.

Co-leaders share their contact email with other logged-in members and help keep the club's page up to date.

To accept, log in to your account, open Clubs, find "{clubName}", and choose "Volunteer to co-lead". You must be a current member of the club with Tier 1 benefits, and a member can co-lead one club at a time.

-- IFPA platform
